sglang.title: [Benchmark] add disable-auto-run param for hicache/bench_multiturn
sglang.author: rzwei
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
By adding the --disable-auto-run option to hicache/bench_multiturn.py, the benchmark can be run at a specific request rate.
By adding the --disable-random-sample, disable random sampling of requests from the ShareGPT dataset.

sglang.title: Preliminary Support for Qwen3XMLDetector
sglang.author: yhyang201
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This is a very basic, preliminary implementation of the Qwen3XMLDetector, intended to provide initial support.
Please note that the related functionality still requires extensive testing, and that Streaming Requests and the EBNF are known to have issues.
Thanks to the Qwen team, maocheng2

vllm.title: Add arcee model
vllm.author: alyosha-swamy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
[New Model] Support Arcee (Arcee Foundational Models)
1. Purpose (Why this PR?)
Add inference support for Arcee Foundational Model (AFM) so that users can serve it with vLLM in both Python and API-server workflows. AFM uses a unique ReLU² activation in its MLP layers, differentiating it from standar

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix eviction cached blocked logic
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
There was a logic error in #21281 causing crashes that triggered by retaining blocks where hashes are already reset.
Tested manually. Crashes before when running large set of benchmarks, no more crashes afterward.

#21208
Seems this break the compilation on AMD device, let's revert this first. And I will have another pr fixing the warning, and the same time having the AMD support as well, but it needs some time to set up the env for amd server, so let's just revert it first

vllm.title: Add tokenization_kwargs to encode for embedding model truncation
vllm.author: Receiling
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, embedding api has supported prompt truncation, while the encode function of async engine (both V1 and V0 engine) does not support long prompt truncation. This PR adds tokenization_kwargs to encode function of both V1 and V0 engine, allowing direct use of engine.encode to truncate inputs f

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Decode Tokenized IDs to Strings for `hf_processor` in `llm.chat()` with `model_impl=transformers`
vllm.author: ariG23498
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a check in the llm.chat() processing logic to decode tokenized IDs back to strings when using model_impl="transformers". This ensures compatibility with the Hugging Face processor (hf_processor), which expects string inputs and does not support raw token IDs.
To verify the issue without

vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a duplicate of #21149 since @tjohnson31415 is now OOO for a while
Purpose
Fix a bug that prevents an LLM() instance from being garbage collected after deletion. This could result in unexpected memory usage or an EADDRINUSE error when attempting to create a second LLM() in the same process.

vllm.author: hmellor
